original_statement: when was the last time daniel tovar play in a short film?
mutated_statement: when was the last time someone do something in something?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + action generalization + object generalization: "daniel tovar" → "someone" (specific person → generic) | "play" → "do something" (specific verb → vague placeholder) | "a short film" → "something" (specific object → vague placeholder)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可见关键语句：“The question is interpreted as asking for the most recent year... The latest entries are from 2010... Therefore, 2010 is correct.” 以及iteration中simple_query和thought直接返回并断定“2010”。Agent没有提及模糊性、未要求澄清，也未表达不确定或多种可能性，而是把泛化后的问题当作明确询问表中最近年份来处理并给出具体答案。因此符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的分类。
